embeddings.content: Claude Email API - Centralized email system using direct Gmail OAuth2. Bypasses unreliable MCP tools. Provides templates for analysis summaries. Hardcoded for David's email (thedavidmurray@gmail.com). Located at /tools/core/claude-email-api.py. Key functions: send_email_to_david(), send_analysis_summary(). Integrates with quality scoring rubric for 60+ score requirement.

Adaptive Link Ingestion - Paradigm shift from arbitrary page limits to intelligent content-aware crawling. Stops when hitting diminishing returns (<5% new information). Strategies: RELEVANCE_FIRST, INFORMATION_GAIN, BREADTH_FIRST, HYBRID. Features URL pattern recognition, content density analysis, keyword focusing. Located at /tools/ingestion/adaptive-link-ingestion.py.

Quality Scoring Rubric - 100-point scoring system for email quality. Minimum 60 points required to send. Positive metrics: specific_tools_mentioned, problems_solved, project_connections, actionable_items. Negative metrics: generic_statistics, vague_descriptions, missing_specifics. Located at /tools/email/quality-scoring-rubric.py.

Chroma Collection Schema - Standardized metadata for knowledge system. Defines SourceType (serena/obsidian/ingestion/manual), ContentType (pattern/solution/insight/architecture), ProjectName enums. ChromaMetadata dataclass with source, project, content_type, timestamp, tags, confidence_score. Located at /tools/integration/chroma_collections.py.

Workspace Cleanup Tool - Automated file organization for /claude-projects. Enforces directory structure: tools/{ingestion,email,core,analysis}, active/, archive/, temp/, resources/, config/, data/. Pattern-based file routing. Temporal cleanup of temp files. Located at /tools/core/workspace-cleanup.py.

YT-DLP Strategic Analysis - Video/audio content extraction for projects. Applications: btc-sentiment-trader (crypto influencer analysis), training data collection, content archiving, livestream monitoring. Python integration with yt_dlp library. Supports transcript extraction, metadata collection. Located at /tools/analysis/yt-dlp-strategic-analysis.py.

Email Automation Workflow Pattern - Complete pipeline: Ingestion → Analysis → Quality Check → Email. Uses adaptive or fixed-limit ingestion, transforms to strategic insights via enhanced-email-templates.py, applies quality-scoring-rubric.py (60+ required), sends via claude-email-api.py. Includes Obsidian vault capture and knowledge persistence.

Quality Gate Pattern - Consistent enforcement across all tools. QualityScore dataclass calculates points for specific mentions, problem solving, project connections, actionability. Penalizes generic statistics, vague descriptions. Returns score and QualityLevel enum (FAILED/POOR/ACCEPTABLE/GOOD/EXCELLENT). Prevents low-quality content delivery.

Adaptive Crawling Pattern - Dynamic stopping based on information gain. Calculates new information ratio using TF-IDF and cosine similarity. URL relevance scoring: /docs/=1.5x, /blog/=1.2x, /tag/=0.5x. Keyword matching multipliers. Respects time limits over page counts. Generates comprehensive crawl analytics.

Tool Composition Integration - Tools designed for pipeline composition. Example: adaptive-link-ingestion.py output → transform-adaptive-to-insights.py → quality_scoring_rubric.py → claude-email-api.py. Standardized JSON interfaces between tools. Bash scripts orchestrate multi-tool workflows. Error propagation and graceful degradation.
